name: fixtures: each positive/negative folder has self-contained .ts files (no cross-folder imports)
command: for d in "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/evals/fixtures/typescript"/*/positive "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/evals/fixtures/typescript"/*/negative "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/evals/fixtures/ts"/*/positive "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/evals/fixtures/ts"/*/negative; do test -d "$d" || continue; cd "$d"; for f in *.ts; do [ -f "$f" ] || continue; if grep -E "^import.*from \"\.\." "$f" >/dev/null; then echo "FAIL cross-folder" 1>&2; exit 1; fi; done; cd - >/dev/null; done; echo ok 1>&2
